patch.value: pm_min_version sets a floor but no ceiling; a CLI major release removing a deprecated capability cannot block stale packages from crashing at activation. pm_max_version closes this.

Optional pm_max_version parsed like pm_min_version; compatibility check covers both bounds; policy mode controls block vs warn; doctor surfaces a max-version-exceeded code; scaffold placeholder; loader tests.
pm_min_version sets a floor but no ceiling; a CLI major release removing a deprecated capability cannot block stale packages from crashing at activation. pm_max_version closes this.

value.author: sdk-version-compat-agent
value.text: Added optional pm_max_version (upper compatibility bound) to ExtensionManifest + EffectiveExtension interfaces, parsed in parseManifest exactly like pm_min_version (parseOptionalManifestString; invalid-shape -> manifest null -> extension_manifest_invalid), mapped through summarizeCandidate. New evaluatePmMaxVersionCompatibility() mirrors the min-version function with warning codes: extension_pm_max_version_invalid (unparseable -> allowed:false BLOCK), extension_pm_max_version_unchecked (current unknown/uncomparable -> allowed:true + warning), extension_pm_max_version_exceeded (current > max -> allowed:false BLOCK). Wired into the same loadCandidate call site so extensionReady now requires BOTH bounds; warning pushed onto extensionWarnings. Kept semantics CONSISTENT with min-version (default-BLOCK, no new policy framework). Left a one-line '// follow-up:' note in loader.ts recommending a future settings toggle to relax default-BLOCK to warn-only per layer -- did NOT balloon scope. doctor.ts surfaces both extension_pm_min_version_*/extension_pm_max_version_* warning families with a remediation line advising authors to align manifest bounds with the installed CLI version. Loader tests merged into tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts: parse-accept(9999.0.0 within bounds), invalid-shape blank-string rejection, unparseable-max block, exceeded(0.0.1) block. Docs updated in docs/EXTENSIONS.md.

patch.value: Added optional pm_max_version to ExtensionManifest/EffectiveExtension + parseManifest + summarizeCandidate; evaluatePmMaxVersionCompatibility mirrors the min-version model and gates extensionReady; doctor surfaces extension_pm_min/max_version_* with remediation. Follow-up noted in loader.ts for an optional future warn-vs-block policy toggle.

pm_max_version upper compatibility bound implemented end-to-end: parsed like pm_min_version, dual-bound gating of extensionReady, warning codes extension_pm_max_version_invalid/_unchecked/_exceeded (default-BLOCK consistent with min-version), doctor remediation, scaffold placeholder, docs, and merged loader tests. Verified live: forcing pm_max_version=2026.4.0 on an installed extension blocks load with extension_pm_max_version_exceeded:...current=2026.5.31 and a clear doctor remediation.
